src: A toy in a soft pink bathrobe with floppy ears, a round snout, button eyes, and a stitched nose. The robe is made of terry cloth.
edit: A whimsical rabbit figure with grey fur and a vibrant blue waistcoat. Its perky ears have gold patterns, and the waistcoat features buttons and a pocket watch chain. The rabbit has a porcelain-like face and sparkling blue eyes.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: Object viewed slightly from above, sits on a gray fleece blanket leaned against a plush pillow and a beige wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is viewed from above, laying flat on a white carpet with small red spots. Its long floppy ears are slightly folded.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is viewed closeup, face centered, leaning against a plush pillow and beige wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object is viewed slightly from above, head rotated left, ears tucked back, sitting on a brown-gray carpet, leaned against a light wooden drawer on the left and a dark blue backpack with a horizontal stripe on the right.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object is sitting on a wooden shelf, viewed from a low angle with a tilted head. There's a black detergent bottle on the left, vertically stacked cardboard boxes behind, and a wall behind the boxes, seen from the right.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: the object sits on a chair on blue fish-patterned bed linen, leaned against a gray knitted pillow, with a long floppy left ear folded behind it.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object is viewed from above, sitting on a wooden bed frame. A white string of fairy lights wraps around the right vertical frame. Behind are a wall on the left and a bed with pillows.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object floats on a blue and white checkerboard blanket, leaning against a large pillow shaped like a golden crown with red hearts. Behind it is a tall wall with swirling patterns in pastel shades, in an Alice-in-Wonderland style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object rests on an intricate checkerboard-patterned carpet with red features, reminiscent of a fantastical landscape. It has long floppy ears, slightly bent and twisting, echoing Wonderland's magical elements.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is viewed closeup, centered, leaning against a plush, patterned pillow and motley wall. The bright colors and intricate details create a surreal, Alice-in-Wonderland style with bends, twists, and curious elements blending the ordinary with fantastical.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object sits on a carpet with brown and gray Wonderland patterns. Ears are tucked behind, head tilted. A wooden drawer has swirling patterns and Cheshire grins. A dark blue backpack with a horizontal stripe is on the other side.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: A scene in Alice-in-Wonderland style with a low view: an object on a carved wooden shelf. A black detergent bottle on the left looks like a potion. Behind are cardboard cards, and on the right, a wall with vibrant patterns.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object rests on an ornate chair atop blue bed linen with fish illustrations, against a plush gray knitted pillow, its floppy left ear folded back, in a dreamlike, vibrant Alice-in-Wonderland style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object rests on an ornately carved wooden frame with intricate designs. A string of glowing fairy lights is around the vertical frame on the right. Behind, a whimsical wall has vibrant patterns and mysterious symbols in an Alice-in-Wonderland style.
